title: ixeris papuana
intro: Ixeris papuana, also known as the dandelion leaf chrysanthemum or the Asian dandelion, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Ixeris papuana include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ixeris papuana include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and reduce symptoms of fever and indigestion. Herbal preparations of Ixeris papuana include teas, infusions, and decoctions made from the plant's leaves and roots, which are traditionally used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
